description: Dexter plugin blocklist — skills and patterns that must never be installed or executed

blockedPatterns.description: Remote code execution via curl pipe
Remote code execution via wget pipe

suspiciousMetadataFlags.description: Skill has empty or missing description — cannot audit intent
Skill requests root/sudo access without documented reason
Skill has no author field in metadata
Skill does not declare allowed-tools — cannot restrict permissions

notes: Blocklist is checked before any community skill installation via openclaw-adapter
Entries in blockedSlugs are exact slug matches (case-insensitive)
Entries in blockedPatterns are regex patterns matched against skill script content
suspiciousMetadataFlags trigger warnings but do not block by default (except requires_root)
To report a new dangerous skill: mem_save to Engram with type=security and title=Blocklist: {slug}
